description: Runtime knowledge references for D-Comp Orchestrator agents. Paths are relative to decomp-orchestrator/knowledge. Default routes favor targeted, evidence-backed decomp iteration; experimental sweeps are opt-in.

director_scheduling.purpose: Target selection and scheduling policy for bounded worker packets.

melee_overview.purpose: Core Melee decomp workflow and quality bar.

melee_targeted_iteration.purpose: One-symbol context, edit, objdiff, cleanup, and validation loop.

melee_resource_research.purpose: Target fact to local analogs to PR/resource evidence to verifier.

melee_matching_tactics.purpose: MWCC source-shape, regalloc, stack, loop, inline, and data-ordering tactics.

melee_ai_assisted_workflow.purpose: How to use AI-generated candidates without trusting unverified source.

melee_evidence_index.purpose: PR-derived evidence base and resource surfaces.

experimental_search_overview.purpose: Optional reproducible experiment workflow for source-shape search.

experimental_search_target_packet.purpose: Baseline metadata collection for experimental search targets.

experimental_search_candidate_matrix.purpose: Candidate families and matrix schema for experimental source-shape search.

experimental_search_high_throughput.purpose: Parallel queue, shard, reducer, dedupe, and beam expansion workflow.

experimental_search_scoring.purpose: Metrics, reviewability scoring, Pareto frontier, and near-miss selection.

experimental_search_post_analysis.purpose: Worked/failed analysis, learned patterns, and next-experiment planning.

experimental_search_objdiff_permuter.purpose: Objdiff JSON summaries, isolated scoring, and permuter handoff.

experimental_search_charts_state.purpose: Progress charts and current_state.md update contract for experimental runs.

rank_decomp_candidates.purpose: Rank fuzzy functions and linked blocker units from build/GALE01/report.json.

decomp_context_lookup.purpose: Search local code, report metadata, PR history, and resource CSVs for one target.

scaffold_decomp_run.purpose: Create a reproducible decomp-runs/<slug> experimental search bundle.

summarize_objdiff_json.purpose: Summarize objdiff JSON for experimental search result rows.

render_progress_charts.purpose: Render experimental search progress, Pareto, and mismatch SVG charts.

fetch_recent_pr_dump.purpose: Fetch recent GitHub PR metadata, comments, reviews, and diffs into the orchestrator-owned past-PR dump.

build_pr_postmortems.purpose: Build searchable per-PR JSON knowledge records and shared Pi-agent prompt standards.

sync_repo_and_pr_library.purpose: Fetch/rebase the local repo and refresh the orchestrator-owned PR knowledge library.
